data.name: dataGridView.ToolTip
data.value: Reflection table: Miller indices, d-spacing, q, 2-theta, structure factor (real/imaginary/|F|/F^2), relative intensity, and extinction condition for each reflection.

data.name: checkBoxHideProhibitedPlanes.ToolTip
data.value: Hide systematically absent (forbidden) reflections - those extinguished by the space-group reflection conditions.

data.name: checkBoxHideEquivalentPlane.ToolTip
data.value: Hide symmetry-equivalent reflections (planes related by symmetry), showing only one representative of each set.

data.name: buttonCopyClipboard.ToolTip
data.value: Copy the reflection table (visible columns, tab-separated) to the clipboard.

data.name: checkBoxBragBrentano.ToolTip
data.value: Show powder diffraction intensities computed for Bragg-Brentano focusing optics (includes the Lorentz-polarization factor); also forces hiding of equivalent and forbidden reflections.

data.name: waveLengthControl1.ToolTip
data.value: Select the radiation source (X-ray, electron, etc.) and its wavelength/energy used to compute 2-theta and diffraction intensities.

data.name: checkBoxTest.ToolTip
data.value: Enable test mode: show the panel for scanning an arbitrary h/k/l index range (including fractional indices) and compute structure factors.

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection indices h, k, l scanned in test mode.

data.name: label3.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection indices h, k, l scanned in test mode.

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection indices h, k, l in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: label5.ToolTip
data.value: Range (min/max/step) of the reflection index h scanned in test mode.

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Range (min/max/step) of the reflection index k scanned in test mode.

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Range (min/max/step) of the reflection index l scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxL_step.ToolTip
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index l in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxL_step.ToolTip1
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index l in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxK_step.ToolTip
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index k in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxK_step.ToolTip1
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index k in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxH_step.ToolTip
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index h in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxH_step.ToolTip1
data.value: Step size for scanning the reflection index h in test mode (0.001-1).

data.name: numericBoxL_max.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index l scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxL_max.ToolTip1
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index l scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxK_max.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index k scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxK_max.ToolTip1
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index k scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxL_min.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index l scanned in test mode (from l min to l max in steps of l step).

data.name: numericBoxL_min.ToolTip1
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index l scanned in test mode (from l min to l max in steps of l step).

data.name: numericBoxK_min.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index k scanned in test mode (from k min to k max in steps of k step).

data.name: numericBoxK_min.ToolTip1
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index k scanned in test mode (from k min to k max in steps of k step).

data.name: numericBoxH_max.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index h scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxH_max.ToolTip1
data.value: Upper bound of the reflection index h scanned in test mode.

data.name: numericBoxH_min.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index h scanned in test mode (from h min to h max in steps of h step).

data.name: numericBoxH_min.ToolTip1
data.value: Lower bound of the reflection index h scanned in test mode (from h min to h max in steps of h step).

data.name: numericBoxCutoffD.ToolTip
data.value: Minimum d-spacing (lattice plane interval) to include; reflections with smaller d are omitted. Unit follows the length-unit selection (angstrom or nm).

data.name: numericBoxCutoffD.ToolTip1
data.value: Minimum d-spacing (lattice plane interval) to include; reflections with smaller d are omitted. Unit follows the length-unit selection (angstrom or nm).

data.name: labelModel.ToolTip
data.value: Atomic scattering-factor model. The available choices switch between X-ray (f(s), F(q)+S(q)) and electron (Peng / Kirkland / 8-Gaussian) according to the selected beam.

data.name: radioButtonXrayFs.ToolTip
data.value: Plot the X-ray atomic scattering factor f(s) (elastic). s = sinθ/λ in Å⁻¹; f(0) equals the atomic number Z (electron units).

data.name: radioButtonXrayFqSq.ToolTip
data.value: Plot the X-ray coherent form factor F(q) and the incoherent (Compton) scattering function S(q) from xraylib. Disabled when xraylib is unavailable.

data.name: radioButtonElectronPeng.ToolTip
data.value: Electron atomic scattering factor fe(s) from Peng's 5-Gaussian parameterization (default).

data.name: radioButtonElectronKirkland.ToolTip
data.value: Electron atomic scattering factor fe(s) from Kirkland's parameterization (3 Lorentzians + 3 Gaussians).

data.name: radioButtonElectronEightGaussian.ToolTip
data.value: Electron atomic scattering factor fe(s) from an 8-Gaussian fit.

data.name: checkBoxDebyeWaller.ToolTip
data.value: Multiply the curves by the Debye-Waller factor exp(-B·s²) to include thermal-vibration damping (B = isotropic displacement parameter Biso).

data.name: tlpAtten.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="graphAtten" Row="0" RowSpan="3" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="numAttenThickness" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="dgvAttenScalars" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="dgvAttenTable" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,62,Percent,38" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,45,Percent,55" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tlpFluor.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="graphFluor" Row="0" RowSpan="2" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="dgvFluorScalars" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="dgvFluorLines" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,62,Percent,38" /><Rows Styles="Percent,40,Percent,60" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: labelFluorNA.Text
data.value: Fluorescence applies to X-ray excitation only.

data.name: numAttenThickness.ToolTip
data.value: Sample thickness for the X-ray transmission calculation I/I0 = exp(-µt). Unit: µm.

data.name: numAttenThickness.ToolTip1
data.value: Sample thickness for the X-ray transmission calculation I/I0 = exp(-µt). Unit: µm.
